g.text: Node.js | macOS launchd | PID on host
Intercepts API calls | Injects real keys | Containers NEVER see credentials
tsc --outDir /tmp/dist → link node_modules → cat stdin → node /tmp/dist/index.js
Recompiles agent-runner per run (allows per-group customization)
Real credentials NEVER leave the host process.
"Hmm, a fine question this is, mon ami..."
